Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class ValueSet

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.ValueSet
public class ValueSet extends Object

Java class for ValueSet complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ValueSet">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="controllingField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="restricted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="valueSetDefinition" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}ValueSetValuesDefinition" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="valueSetName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="valueSettings" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}ValueSettings" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getValueSettings

      public List<ValueSettings> getValueSettings()
      Gets the value of the valueSettings property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the valueSettings property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getValueSettings().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list ValueSettings

      Returns:
      The value of the valueSettings property.
